series_metadata.series_description: Includes records for the following grant programs which were both state and federally funded: Green Pathways grant program, H-1B Technical Skills training grant, and the Ohio Skills Bank grant program. These records include reports and financial records.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper records may be scanned and destroyed. Paper records that are not scanned should be retained three years following end of grant period.In event of an open audit on these records at end of retention period, audit is complete and discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: three years following end of grant period.In event of an open audit on these records at end of retention period, audit is complete and discrepancies resolved
